name: SPRINT BIOSCIENCE AB
summary: Sprint Bioscience AB (publ) develops pharmaceutical products in the areas of cancer and metabolism. It engages in developing VPS34, a drug candidate for the treatment of various types of cancer; and PIP4K2, a drug candidate for the treatment of cancer. The company also focuses on research of products for the treatment of tumor metabolism and type 2 diabetes. Sprint Bioscience AB (publ) was founded in 2009 and is based in Huddinge, Sweden.
